# Kristian Lentino

> Engineer, AI builder, and co-founder of Koomy — Italy's digital comics platform.

## Pages

- [Home](https://kristianlentino.it/): Editorial founder portfolio — engineering, AI work, and the Koomy story.
- [About](https://kristianlentino.it/about): Background, expertise, manga taste, and personal arc.
- [Koomy](https://kristianlentino.it/koomy): What Koomy is, how it works, and the mission behind it.
- [Timeline](https://kristianlentino.it/timeline): Career milestones and key projects.

## Tech stack

- React 19, TypeScript, Vite
- Vitest, Testing Library, Playwright, Storybook
- Google Analytics (GA4) with CookieYes consent management
- GitHub Actions CI/CD deploying to GitHub Pages

## Source

https://github.com/KristianLentino99/portfolio
